'''chakodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qiran|qiran]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qiran|qiran]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chakodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chækedheth|chækedheth]] || [[word:chækedhej|chækedhej]] || [[word:chækedhesh|chækedhesh]] || [[word:chækedhe|chækedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chakokodhoth|chakokodhoth]] || [[word:chakokodhoj|chakokodhoj]] || [[word:chakokodhosh|chakokodhosh]] || [[word:chakokodho|chakokodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chakodhoth|chakodhoth]] || [[word:chakodhoj|chakodhoj]] || [[word:chakodhosh|chakodhosh]] || [[word:chakodho|chakodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chakofdhoth|chakofdhoth]] || [[word:chakofdhoj|chakofdhoj]] || [[word:chakofdhosh|chakofdhosh]] || [[word:chakofdhof|chakofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chakodhotho|chakodhotho]] || [[word:chakodhojo|chakodhojo]] || [[word:chakodhosho|chakodhosho]] || [[word:chakodhoko|chakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chakodhoth|chakodhoth]] || [[word:chakodhoj|chakodhoj]] || [[word:chakodhosh|chakodhosh]] || [[word:chakodho|chakodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chakodhothol|chakodhothol]] || [[word:chakodhojol|chakodhojol]] || [[word:chakodhoshol|chakodhoshol]] || [[word:chakodhokol|chakodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chakodhothotho|chakodhothotho]] || [[word:chakodhojojo|chakodhojojo]] || [[word:chakodhoshosho|chakodhoshosho]] || [[word:chakodhoko|chakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chakodhothon|chakodhothon]] || [[word:chakodhojon|chakodhojon]] || [[word:chakodhoshon|chakodhoshon]] || [[word:chakodhokon|chakodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chakodhothoro|chakodhothoro]] || [[word:chakodhojoro|chakodhojoro]] || [[word:chakodhoshoro|chakodhoshoro]] || [[word:chakodhokoro|chakodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
